sentences.target: Ich schaue die neue Folge heute Abend.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃaʊ̯ə diː ˈnɔɪ̯ə ˈfɔlɡə ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈaːbənt/

translations.de: Ich schaue die neue Folge heute Abend.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃaʊ̯ə diː ˈnɔɪ̯ə ˈfɔlɡə ˈhɔɪ̯tə ˈaːbənt/
translations.en: I'm watching the new episode tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche voy a ver el nuevo capítulo.
translations.fr: Je regarde le nouvel épisode ce soir.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 새 에피소드를 볼 거야.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vou assistir ao novo episódio.
translations.he: הלילה אני רואה את הפרק החדש.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi sẽ xem tập mới.
translations.nl: Vanavond ga ik de nieuwe aflevering kijken.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я подивлюся нову серію.
translations.hu: Ma este megnézem az új részt.
translations.hi: आज रात मैं नया एपिसोड देखूँगा।
translations.el: Απόψε θα δω το νέο επεισόδιο.
translations.nb: I kveld skal jeg se den nye episoden.
translations.id: Malam ini aku akan menonton episode baru.
translations.sv: I kväll ska jag titta på det nya avsnittet.
translations.ro: Diseară mă uit la noul episod.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se podívám na nový díl.
translations.da: I aften ser jeg det nye afsnit.
translations.ja: 今夜は新しいエピソードを見る。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object in the accusative.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Folge' as the direct object.
Attributive adjective with weak inflection after a definite article; agrees feminine accusative singular with 'Folge'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the accusative object NP 'die neue Folge'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the event.
Noun used adverbially in the temporal expression 'heute Abend'; no article; time-of-day specification.

sentences.target: Das ist die Folge der Preiserhöhung.
sentences.reading: /das ɪst diː ˈfɔlɡə fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈpʁaɪ̯zɛʁˌhøːʊŋ/

translations.de: Das ist die Folge der Preiserhöhung.
translations.ipa: /das ɪst diː ˈfɔlɡə fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈpʁaɪ̯zɛʁˌhøːʊŋ/
translations.en: That's the result of the price increase.
translations.es: Eso es consecuencia de la subida de precios.
translations.fr: C'est la conséquence de la hausse des prix.
translations.it: È la conseguenza dell’aumento dei prezzi.
translations.yue: 呢個就係加價帶嚟嘅後果。
translations.pt: Isso é consequência do aumento de preços.
translations.vi: Đó là hậu quả của việc tăng giá.
translations.nl: Dat is het gevolg van la prijsverhoging.
translations.hi: यह कीमतों के बढ़ने का नतीजा है।
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το αποτέλεσμα της αύξησης των τιμών.
translations.nb: Det er en følge av prisøkningen.
translations.sv: Det är en följd av prisökningen.
translations.da: Det er en følge af prisstigningen.
translations.ja: それは値上げの結果だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, neuter nominative singular; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the predicate nominal 'Folge'.
Common noun, feminine singular; predicate nominative after 'ist'.
Definite article, feminine genitive singular; marks the possessive/genitive relationship.
Compound noun, feminine singular; head of the genitive NP indicating cause.

sentences.target: Du hast die erste Folge schon gesehen.
sentences.reading: /duː hast diː ˈeːɐ̯stə ˈfɔlɡə ʃoːn ɡəˈzeːən/

translations.de: Du hast die erste Folge schon gesehen.
translations.ipa: /duː hast diː ˈeːɐ̯stə ˈfɔlɡə ʃoːn ɡəˈzeːən/
translations.en: You've already seen the first episode.
translations.es: Ya has visto el primer capítulo.
translations.fr: Tu as déjà vu le premier épisode.
translations.it: Hai già visto la prima puntata.
translations.pt: Você já viu o primeiro episódio.
translations.vi: Bạn đã xem tập đầu rồi.
translations.nl: Je hebt de eerste aflevering al gezien.
translations.hi: तुम पहला एपिसोड पहले ही देख चुके हो।
translations.el: Έχεις ήδη δει το πρώτο επεισόδιο.
translations.nb: Du har allerede sett første episode.
translations.sv: Du har redan sett första avsnittet.
translations.da: Du har allerede set første afsnit.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; forms the perfect with the past participle.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Folge' as the direct object.
Ordinal adjective used attributively; agrees feminine accusative singular with 'Folge'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the accusative object NP.
Temporal/degree adverb indicating prior completion.
Past participle (Partizip II) of the lexical verb; complements 'hast' to form the perfect; clause-final.

sentences.target: Die Folge war ein langer Stau.

translations.de: Die Folge war ein langer Stau.
translations.en: The result was a long traffic jam.
translations.es: El resultado fue un gran atasco.
translations.fr: La conséquence a été un long embouteillage.
translations.it: Il risultato è stato una lunga coda.
translations.zh-Hans: 结果是一场长时间的堵车。
translations.yue: 結果就係一場好耐嘅塞車。
translations.pt: O resultado foi um longo engarrafamento.
translations.vi: Kết quả là kẹt xe kéo dài.
translations.nl: Het resultaat was een lange file.
translations.hu: Az eredmény egy hosszú dugó lett.
translations.el: Το αποτέλεσμα ήταν ένα μεγάλο μποτιλιάρισμα.
translations.ro: Rezultatul a fost un ambuteiaj de durată.
translations.ja: 結果は長い渋滞だった。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, preterite, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
